title: Extract agent loop + provider into agentic-core
description: Move the agent loop (MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS loop, message management, tool dispatch) and provider abstraction (createProvider, Provider interface, anthropic/openai adapters, types) from agentic-lite into the new agentic-core package. agentic-core should expose: runAgentLoop(), createProvider(), and all provider types. Acceptance: agentic-core exports working loop and provider, builds cleanly.
